title: I didn't mean it that way
body:
This mod makes it so if you hit a villager with an empty hand it will not damage the villager and make it upset.

 

There's also an option to only damage villagers when holding a tool, empty hands and any other item will not damage the villager.

 

Great for those who have bad trackpads which randomly left click when used.

[Discord](https://discord.gg/DvpKQyB3zn)


[![Sponsor Time](https://jonn.dk/akliz_banner_productivebees.png)](https://www.akliz.net/lobstermods)
